configuration.name: Overwrite All Values From Memory File
configuration.description: Loads in all values from memory, overwriting current settings.

configuration.name: Load Configuration
configuration.description: Load the configuration from the selected .dat file into Sysconfig.

configuration.name: EPWM Lock Register
configuration.description: Lock EPWM registers

configuration.name: Generate Code Template
configuration.description: Enable the template code generation

configuration.name: Code Template Name
configuration.description: The name of the code template generated for this EPWM configuration

configuration.name: Enable Global Shadow to Active Load
configuration.description: all the shadow to active reload events are defined by GLDMODE bits in GLDCTL register

configuration.name: Emulation Mode
configuration.value: Stop after next Time Base counter increment or decrement
choices: Stop after next Time Base counter increment or decrement
Stop when counter completes whole cycle
configuration.description: Behavior of the ePWM time-base counter during emulation events

configuration.name: Time Base Clock Divider
configuration.description: CLKDIV: These bits select the time base clock pre-scale value, TBCLK = EPWMCLK/(HSPCLKDIV*CLKDIV)
infos: For perfectly synchronized TBCLKs across multiple EPWM modules, the prescaler bits in the TBCTL register of each EPWM module must be set identically

configuration.name: High Speed Clock Divider
configuration.description: HSPCLKDIV: These bits determine part of the time-base clock pre-scale value, TBCLK = EPWMCLK/(HSPCLKDIV*CLKDIV)

configuration.name: Time Base Period Load Mode
configuration.value: PWM Period register access is through shadow register
choices: PWM Period register access is through shadow register
PWM Period register access is directly
configuration.description: Period load mode for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Time Base Period Load Event
configuration.value: Shadow to active load occurs when time base counter reaches 0
choices: Shadow to active load occurs when time base counter reaches 0
Shadow to active load occurs when time base counter reaches 0 and a SYNC occurs
Shadow to active load occurs only when a SYNC occurs
configuration.description: Period load event for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Time Base Period
configuration.description: Period for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Time Base Period Link
configuration.description: Simultaneous write to the current ePWM module PRD register

configuration.name: Enable Time Base Period Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for PRD

configuration.name: Initial Counter Value
configuration.description: Initial Counter value for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Counter Mode
configuration.description: Mode of the Counter value for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Enable Phase Shift Load
configuration.description: Enable phase shift load for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Force a Sync Pulse
configuration.description: Force a sync pulse for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Sync In Pulse Source
configuration.value: Sync-in source is EPWM1 sync-out signal
choices: Sync-in source is EPWM1 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM2 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM3 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM4 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM5 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM6 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is EPWM7 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is ECAP1 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is ECAP2 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is ECAP3 sync-out signal
Sync-in source is Input XBAR out5 signal
Sync-in source is Input XBAR out6 signal
configuration.description: Sync in Pulse for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: Sync Out Pulse
value: Counter zero event generates EPWM sync-out pulse
choices: Software force generated EPWM sync-out pulse
Counter zero event generates EPWM sync-out pulse
Counter equal to CMPB event generates EPWM sync-out pulse
Counter equal to CMPC event generates EPWM sync-out pulse
Counter equal to CMPD event generates EPWM sync-out pulse
DCA Event 1 Sync signal generates EPWM sync-out pulse
DCB Event 1 Sync signal generates EPWM sync-out pulse
configuration.description: Sync Out Pulse for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: One-Shot Sync Out Trigger
configuration.description: One-Shot Sync Out Trigger for the Time Base Counter Submodule

configuration.name: EPWMxSYNCPER Source Select
choices: Counter equals COMPC when counting up
Counter equals COMPC when counting down
Counter equals COMPD when counting up
Counter equals COMPD when counting down
configuration.description: Selects the source of the EPWMSYNCPER signal that goes to the CMPSS and GPDAC

configuration.name: Counter Compare A (CMPA)
configuration.description: Counter Compare A (CMPA) value

configuration.name: Enable Counter Compare A (CMPA) Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for CMPA

configuration.name: Enable Shadow Counter Compare A (CMPA)
configuration.description: Enable Shadow Counter Compare A (CMPA) value

configuration.name: Counter Compare A Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero
Load on sync or when counter equals period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Counter Compare A Shadow Load Event

configuration.name: Counter Compare A (CMPA) Link
configuration.description: Simultaneous write to the current ePWM module CMPA register

configuration.name: Counter Compare B (CMPB)
configuration.description: Counter Compare B (CMPB) value

configuration.name: Enable Counter Compare B (CMPB) Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for CMPB

configuration.name: Enable Shadow Counter Compare B (CMPB)
configuration.description: Enable Shadow Counter Compare B (CMPB) value

configuration.name: Counter Compare B Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero
Load on sync or when counter equals period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Counter Compare B Shadow Load Event

configuration.name: Counter Compare B (CMPB) Link
configuration.description: Simultaneous write to the current ePWM module CMPB register

configuration.name: Counter Compare C (CMPC)
configuration.description: Counter Compare C (CMPC) value

configuration.name: Enable Counter Compare C (CMPC) Global Load

configuration.name: Enable Shadow Counter Compare C (CMPC)
configuration.description: Enable Shadow Counter Compare C (CMPC) value

configuration.name: Counter Compare C Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero
Load on sync or when counter equals period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Counter Compare C Shadow Load Event

configuration.name: Counter Compare C (CMPC) Link
configuration.description: Simultaneous write to the current ePWM module CMPC register

configuration.name: Counter Compare D (CMPD)
configuration.description: Counter Compare D (CMPD) value

configuration.name: Enable Counter Compare D (CMPD) Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for CMPD

configuration.name: Enable Shadow Counter Compare D (CMPD)
configuration.description: Enable Shadow Counter Compare D (CMPD) value

configuration.name: Counter Compare D Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero
Load on sync or when counter equals period
Load on sync or when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Counter Compare D Shadow Load Event

configuration.name: Counter Compare D (CMPD) Link
configuration.description: Simultaneous write to the current ePWM module CMPD register

configuration.name: Enable Continuous SW Force Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for AQCSFRC

configuration.name: Continuous SW Force Shadow Mode
configuration.value: Shadow mode load when counter equals zero
choices: Shadow mode load when counter equals zero
Shadow mode load when counter equals period
Shadow mode load when counter equals zero or period
No shadow load mode. Immediate mode only.

configuration.name: T1 Trigger Source
infos: T1/T2 selection and configuration of a trip/digital-compare event is indpendent of the configuration of that event in the Trip-Zone submodule

configuration.name: T2 Trigger Source
infos: T1/T2 selection and configuration of a trip/digital-compare event is indpendent of the configuration of that event in the Trip-Zone submodule

configuration.name: Rising Edge Delay Input
configuration.description: Select the source for DBRED (Rising Edge Delay)

configuration.name: Falling Edge Delay Input
choices: Input signal is the output of Rising Edge delay
configuration.description: Select the source for DBFED (Falling Edge Delay)

configuration.name: Rising Edge Delay Polarity
configuration.description: Whether or not to invert RED (Rising Edge Delay)

configuration.name: Falling Edge Delay Polarity
configuration.description: Whether or not to invert FED (Falling Edge Delay)

configuration.name: Enable Rising Edge Delay
configuration.description: Enable DBRED (Rising Edge Delay) by choosing it as the source for the A path

configuration.name: RED Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Shadow to active load event for the RED (Rising Edge Delay) register.

configuration.name: Enable RED Shadow Mode
configuration.description: Enable shadowing of the RED (Rising Edge Delay) register.

configuration.name: Rising Edge Delay Value
configuration.description: DBRED (Rising Edge Delay) delay value

configuration.name: Enable Falling Edge Delay
configuration.description: Enable DBFED (Falling Edge Delay) by choosing it as the source for the B path

configuration.name: FED Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Shadow to active load event for the FED (Falling Edge Delay) register.

configuration.name: Enable FED Shadow Mode
configuration.description: Enable shadowing of the FED (Falling Edge Delay) register.

configuration.name: Falling Edge Delay Value
configuration.description: DBFED (Falling Edge Delay) delay value

configuration.name: Swap Output for EPWMxA
configuration.description: Check to enable output swap. Channel A path to Out B.

configuration.name: Swap Output for EPWMxB
configuration.description: Check to enable output swap. Channel B path to Out A.

configuration.name: Enable Deadband Control Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for deadband control

configuration.name: Deadband Control Shadow Load Event
choices: Load when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Shadow to active load event for the DBCTL (Deadband Control) register.

configuration.name: Enable Deadband Control Shadow Mode
configuration.description: Enable shadowing of the DBCTL (Deadband Control) register.

configuration.name: Enable RED Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for RED

configuration.name: Enable FED Global Load
configuration.description: Use global load configuration for FED

configuration.name: Dead Band Counter Clock Rate
configuration.value: Dead band counter runs at TBCLK rate
choices: Dead band counter runs at TBCLK rate
Dead band counter runs at 2*TBCLK rate
configuration.description: Dead band counter clock rate.

configuration.name: Use Chopper
configuration.description: Check to configure the Chopper Submodule

configuration.name: Use Advanced EPWM Trip Zone Actions
configuration.description: Check this to use Advanced EPWM trip zone actions. Uncheck to use legacy (TZCTL2[ETZE])

configuration.name: TZA Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_TZA. (TZ1 - TZ6, DCAEVT2, DCAEVT1)

configuration.name: TZB Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_TZB. (TZ1 - TZ6, DCBEVT2, DCBEVT1)

configuration.name: DCAEVT1 Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_DCAEVT1. (DCAEVT1 (Digital Compare A event 1))

configuration.name: DCAEVT2 Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_DCAEVT2. (DCAEVT2 (Digital Compare A event 2))

configuration.name: DCBEVT1 Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_DCBEVT1. (DCBEVT1 (Digital Compare B event 1))

configuration.name: DCBEVT2 Event
configuration.description: The action to take on EPWM_TZ_ACTION_EVENT_DCBEVT2. (DCBEVT2 (Digital Compare B event 2))

configuration.name: One-Shot Source
configuration.description: Check to enable the source to the One-Shot OR gate

configuration.name: CBC Source
configuration.description: Check to enable the source to the CBC OR gate

configuration.name: CBC Latch Clear Signal
configuration.value: Clear CBC pulse when counter equals zero
choices: Clear CBC pulse when counter equals zero
Clear CBC pulse when counter equals period
Clear CBC pulse when counter equals zero or period
configuration.description: Select the CBC Trip Zone Latch Clear Signal (TZCLR[CBCPULSE])

configuration.name: TZ Interrupt Source (ORed)
choices: Trip Zones Cycle By Cycle interrupt
configuration.description: Select the all the signals which should be enabled to generate a TZINT.

configuration.name: Register Interrupt Handler
configuration.description: Whether or not to register interrupt handlers in the interrupt module.

configuration.name: Digital Compare A High
configuration.description: Trip input to the Digital Compare A High

configuration.name: Combination Input Sources (Digital Compare A High)
configuration.description: Select the sources to include in the Combination input sources

configuration.name: Digital Compare A Low
configuration.description: Trip input to the Digital Compare A Low

configuration.name: Combination Input Sources (Digital Compare A Low)
configuration.description: Select the sources to include in the Combination input sources

configuration.name: Condition For Digital Compare output 1 A
choices: Event when DCxL high DCxH low
configuration.description: Select the Condition for Digital Compare output 1 A for which the EVENT is generated.

configuration.name: Condition For Digital Compare output 2 A
choices: Event when DCxL high DCxH low
configuration.description: Select the Condition for Digital Compare output 2 A for which the EVENT is generated.

configuration.description: Enable/disable generation of ADC SOC Event for Digital Compare Module A Digital Compare Event number 1

configuration.name: Generate SYNCOUT (DCAEVT1)
configuration.description: Enable/disable generation of SYNCOUTEvent for Digital Compare Module A Digital Compare Event number 1

choices: DC input signal is synced with TBCLK
DC input signal is not synced with TBCLK

configuration.description: Select the Signal Source for Digital Compare Module A Digital Compare Event number 1

configuration.description: Select the CBC latch mode for Digital Compare Module A Digital Compare Event number 1

Clear CBC latch when counter equals zero or period

configuration.name: Digital Compare Filter Input (DCEVTFILT event source)
configuration.value: DC filter signal source is DCAEVT1
choices: DC filter signal source is DCAEVT1
DC filter signal source is DCAEVT2
DC filter signal source is DCBEVT1
DC filter signal source is DCBEVT2
configuration.description: Select the event source for the DCEVTFILT signal

configuration.name: Use Blanking Window
configuration.description: Use blanking window to blank the DCEVTFILT signal

configuration.name: Use DC Counter Capture
configuration.description: Use the DC Counter Capture feature to capture the TBCTR value at the selected event.

configuration.name: Use Edge Filter
configuration.description: The DCEVTFILT signal and DCCAP (Counter Capture) will use the output of the edge filter

configuration.name: Enable EPWM Interrupt
configuration.description: Check to enable EPWM interrupt

configuration.name: Register Interrupt Handler
configuration.description: Whether or not to register interrupt handlers in the interrupt module.

configuration.name: Interrupt Event Sources
choices: Time-base counter equal to zero or period
time-base counter equal to CMPA when the timer is incrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPC when the timer is incrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPA when the timer is decrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPC when the timer is decrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPB when the timer is incrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPD when the timer is incrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPB when the timer is decrementing
time-base counter equal to CMPD when the timer is decrementing
configuration.description: Select all events that must be enabled to generate an EPWM interrupt

configuration.name: Interrupt Event Count
configuration.description: The number of events that have to occur before an interrupt is issued

configuration.name: Interrupt Event Count Initial Value Load Enable
configuration.description: Enables the ePWM interrupt counter to be pre-interrupt loaded with a count value after a SYNC or software force

configuration.name: Force Interrupt Event Count Initial Value
configuration.description: Forces the ePWM interrupt counter to be pre-interrupt loaded with the init count value

configuration.name: SOCA Trigger Enable
configuration.description: Enable the SOC trigger generated by the ET submodule for SOCA

configuration.name: SOCB Trigger Enable
configuration.description: Enable the SOC trigger generated by the ET submodule for SOCB

configuration.name: Enable HRPWM Support
configuration.description: Click the checkbox to enable hrpwm support

configuration.name: PinMux Use Case
configuration.description: Peripheral use case

configuration.name: Pin Type
choices: Push-pull output/floating INVERTED polarity on an input
Push-pull output/pull-up enabled on INVERTED input
Open-drain output with pull-up enabled output and input
Open-drain output with pull-up enabled output and INVERTED input
configuration.description: Type of pin is driving the gpio.

configuration.name: Qualification Mode
configuration.description: The type of qualification done on the pin.

configuration.name: Pin Type
choices: Push-pull output/floating INVERTED polarity on an input
Push-pull output/pull-up enabled on INVERTED input
Open-drain output with pull-up enabled output and input
Open-drain output with pull-up enabled output and INVERTED input
configuration.description: Type of pin is driving the gpio.

configuration.name: Qualification Mode
configuration.description: The type of qualification done on the pin.
